useCases.title: Automated Permitting Workflow with AI Agents
useCases.businessProblem: Manual permit intake and routing takes weeks and is error-prone, frustrating residents and staff.
useCases.currentProcess: Paper and email submissions manually triaged by clerks across multiple departments.
useCases.proposedSolution: An AI agent classifies permit applications, checks completeness, routes to the right department, and drafts responses.
useCases.compliance: PII handled under state records policy; access trimmed.
useCases.risks: Model drift on edge-case permit types.
useCases.businessValue: Cuts permit processing time from weeks to days.
useCases.feasibility: High — built on existing Power Platform tenant.

useCases.title: Real-Time 911 Call Summarization
useCases.businessProblem: Dispatchers manually note key facts during high-stress calls, risking missed details.
useCases.currentProcess: Manual note-taking in the CAD system during live calls.
useCases.proposedSolution: Live transcription and AI summarization surfaces location, threat level, and key entities in real time.

useCases.title: Benefits Eligibility Copilot for Caseworkers
useCases.businessProblem: Caseworkers navigate complex, changing eligibility rules across many programs, slowing decisions.
useCases.currentProcess: Manual lookup across policy manuals and multiple systems.
useCases.proposedSolution: A document-grounded Copilot answers eligibility questions with citations to current policy.
useCases.compliance: PII minimized; citations required for every answer.

useCases.title: Predictive Maintenance for Transit Fleets
useCases.businessProblem: Unplanned bus breakdowns disrupt service and inflate repair costs.
useCases.currentProcess: Reactive maintenance on fixed mileage schedules.
useCases.proposedSolution: Telemetry and ML predict component failures before they happen, scheduling proactive maintenance.

useCases.title: Student Success Early-Warning System
useCases.businessProblem: At-risk students are often identified too late for effective intervention.
useCases.currentProcess: Manual review of grades and attendance by advisors mid-semester.
useCases.proposedSolution: Analytics surface early risk signals so advisors can intervene proactively.
useCases.solutionPlay: Power Business Decisions with Cloud Scale Analytics

useCases.title: Constituent Service Chatbot
useCases.businessProblem: Call centers are overwhelmed with routine status and how-to questions.
useCases.currentProcess: Phone and email handled by limited call-center staff.
useCases.proposedSolution: A multilingual chatbot answers common questions and hands off complex cases to staff.
useCases.businessValue: Deflects routine calls, frees staff for complex cases.

useCases.title: NYC AI Hackathon — Database & AI Workload Acceleration
useCases.businessProblem: NYC agencies needed to move legacy database and AI workloads to the cloud faster, but lacked a low-risk way to prove out the Microsoft full stack quickly.
useCases.currentProcess: Long, exploratory cloud evaluations with no hands-on validation across data, apps, and AI.
useCases.proposedSolution: A 1.5-day AI hackathon accelerated database and AI workloads and showcased the Microsoft full stack across Azure, Data, Apps, AI, and GitHub Copilot — opening broader Cloud + AI priorities.
useCases.beneficiaries: NYC agency IT teams, developers, city leadership
useCases.copilotRole: AI-assisted development across data and app workloads
useCases.dataDependencies: Legacy agency databases and app data
useCases.compliance: Government data handled under agency policy.
useCases.risks: Sustaining momentum from event to funded engagement.
useCases.businessValue: Accelerated cloud + AI adoption; part of 325k+ combined ACR accelerated across the FY26 program.
useCases.impactMetric: Time to validate cloud + AI workloads
useCases.feasibility: High — delivered via Cloud Accelerate Factory at no cost.
useCases.reusability: High — the motion scales across agencies and geographies.

useCases.title: Louisiana OTS — App-in-a-Day Azure App & Database Modernization
useCases.businessProblem: Louisiana Office of Technology Services (OTS) was stalled in cloud exploration, with Azure in an AWS bake-off and no clear action plan.
useCases.currentProcess: Exploratory platform evaluation without hands-on Azure validation.
useCases.proposedSolution: An App-in-a-Day validated Azure app-dev, database, and GitHub Copilot through hands-on scenarios — moving OTS from exploration to active Azure evaluation and reopening the platform decision.
useCases.beneficiaries: Louisiana OTS developers and architects, state agency stakeholders
useCases.risks: Competitive displacement in the AWS bake-off.
useCases.businessValue: Positioned Azure in the AWS bake-off and converted technical discovery into a scoped action plan with an updated cost view.
useCases.reusability: High across state agencies evaluating cloud platforms.

useCases.title: Florida App / AI in a Day — Scaling App Modernization + AI Readiness
useCases.businessProblem: Teams were interested in modernization and AI but had not moved to execution, and it was unclear the motion could scale beyond one geography.
useCases.currentProcess: Interest without a repeatable path from idea to execution.
useCases.proposedSolution: An App / AI in a Day combined application modernization with AI readiness, moving teams from interest to execution and demonstrating the model scales beyond a single geography.
useCases.beneficiaries: Florida agency teams, developers, GTM stakeholders
useCases.copilotRole: App modernization and AI readiness accelerator
useCases.risks: Consistency of delivery quality as the motion scales.
useCases.businessValue: Proved the one-to-many event motion drives Azure consumption and scales across geographies.

useCases.title: Legacy App Modernization at Speed with GitHub Copilot (NYC)
useCases.businessProblem: Legacy Microsoft Access and Oracle form-based applications were costly to maintain and slow to modernize.
useCases.currentProcess: Manual re-write of form-based apps with long development cycles.
useCases.proposedSolution: AI-assisted development with GitHub Copilot modernized legacy Access and Oracle form-based applications at speed, refactoring and migrating faster to Azure.
useCases.beneficiaries: NYC agency developers and application owners
useCases.copilotRole: Code, refactor, and migrate legacy applications
useCases.risks: Data fidelity during migration from legacy stores.
useCases.businessValue: Faster modernization and reduced maintenance burden on legacy form-based apps.
useCases.reusability: Very high across agencies with legacy Access/Oracle apps.

useCases.title: Operational Workflow Automation Across NYC Agencies
useCases.businessProblem: Procurement, inspections, identity/access, and IT workflows were manual and fragmented across many NYC agencies.
useCases.proposedSolution: Modernized and automated procurement, inspections, identity/access, and IT workflows across NYC Buildings, Sanitation, FDNY, Health, Housing, and OMB.
useCases.beneficiaries: NYC Buildings, Sanitation, FDNY, Health, Housing, and OMB staff
useCases.businessValue: Reduced manual effort and standardized operational workflows across agencies.
useCases.reusability: Very high — common back-office workflows across government.

useCases.title: Resident Service Chatbots & Voice Assistants (NYC)
useCases.businessProblem: High call volumes strained frontline staff and slowed service for NYC residents.
useCases.currentProcess: Phone and in-person support handled by limited frontline staff.
useCases.proposedSolution: Public chatbots, voice assistants, and guidance tools reduced call volume and improved user experiences for NYC residents and frontline staff.
useCases.risks: Coverage gaps for complex or multilingual requests.
useCases.businessValue: Reduced call volume and improved resident and staff experience.

useCases.title: Natural-Language Leadership Dashboards (NYC)
useCases.businessProblem: Leaders depended on business analysts to answer data questions, delaying real-time insight.
useCases.currentProcess: Static reports and analyst-built dashboards with turnaround delays.
useCases.proposedSolution: Natural-language dashboards enable real-time leadership insights without business-analyst dependency.
useCases.solutionPlay: Power Business Decisions with Cloud Scale Analytics
useCases.risks: Data quality and governance across sources.
useCases.businessValue: Real-time, self-service leadership insight without analyst dependency.
useCases.impactMetric: Time to answer a leadership data question
